name: electron-browser
description: Windows Electron WebView Browser with advanced controls
author: User

scripts.build:fast: mkdir dist\app-tmp 2>nul & copy /Y main.js dist\app-tmp\ >nul & copy /Y preload.js dist\app-tmp\ >nul & copy /Y index.html dist\app-tmp\ >nul & copy /Y error.html dist\app-tmp\ >nul & node -e "const a=require('@electron/asar');a.createPackage('dist/app-tmp','dist/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar').then(()=>{const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('dist/app-tmp',{recursive:true,force:true})})" && node node_modules/electron-builder/cli.js --win portable --prepackaged=dist/win-unpacked
scripts.build:install:fast: mkdir dist\app-tmp 2>nul & copy /Y main.js dist\app-tmp\ >nul & copy /Y preload.js dist\app-tmp\ >nul & copy /Y index.html dist\app-tmp\ >nul & copy /Y error.html dist\app-tmp\ >nul & node -e "const a=require('@electron/asar');a.createPackage('dist/app-tmp','dist/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar').then(()=>{const fs=require('fs');fs.rmSync('dist/app-tmp',{recursive:true,force:true})})" && electron-builder --win --config.win.target=["nsis"] --prepackaged=dist/win-unpacked
